item.title: Neural Embedding of Research Papers Reveals Characteristics of Policy Research Institute
item.description: \(Munjung Kim^1, Jisung Yoon^2, Hyunuk Kim^3, Woo-Sung Jung^{1,2}\) \(^1\)Department of Physics, Pohang University of Science and Technology; \(^2\)Department of Industrial and Management Engineering,PohangUniversity of Science and Technology; \(^3\)Questrom School of Business, Boston University
